user.title: Google Assistant (Manual)
user.description:
Enter your Google Cloud project ID.

Follow the setup guide at {guide_url} (steps 1–13). You'll paste your service account JSON key in the next step.

If you already have google_assistant: in your configuration.yaml, this integration replaces it — you can remove that section.

service_account.title: Service Account
service_account.description:
Paste your service account JSON key file contents.

Create one at {docs_url} (step 12 of the guide at {guide_url}).

data_description.service_account: Paste your downloaded service account JSON key

error.invalid_project_id: Project ID must be 6-30 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens
error.Invalid JSON: The text is not valid JSON
error.Missing 'client_email': The JSON is missing the 'client_email' field
error.Missing 'private_key': The JSON is missing the 'private_key' field
